positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial journey. The main subject is a group of friendly, stylized woodland creatures (foxes, owls, deer) gathered around a glowing, geometric constellation map. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring strong black silhouettes against a deep indigo and sapphire blue gradient background that subtly fades into cosmic dust specks. Use a clean, modern, linework style combined with pop-art flat colors and high contrast. Ensure the edges are crisp and vector-like for perfect print quality. Focus on clean lines and impactful shapes, suitable for large apparel printing.
